summary: The SwingRatings algorithm indicates that XEL is currently testing its Daily 100MA support zone near $77.57. Based on historical price action, bounces from this level have yielded a win rate of 43.8%. The asset has recently tested this support 1 time(s), which may have partially consumed buy-side liquidity. In the event of a successful bounce, traders should monitor overhead supply, particularly a primary horizontal resistance at $81.91 and a significant trendline confluence around $81.86 (formed by 15 points). This setup presents a structured risk-reward profile for swing positioning.
